'''DFS-1138''' was a [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class starfighter]] assigned to the [[Saak'ak/Legends|''Saak'ak'']]. When [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] arrived onboard, DFS-1138 was present in the hangar. Later, when the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] ship was destroyed, DFS-1138 was seen fleeing the hangar with his fellow droid fighters.

{{Droid-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
DFS-1138 is one of many [[1138 (easter egg)|references]] throughout ''Star Wars'' media to [[George Lucas]]' first feature film, [[Wikipedia:THX 1138|''THX 1138'']].
